cases.description: A cell holding a plain arithmetic formula -> FORMULATEXT returns the exact formula text as typed
Formula text with nested string literals is returned verbatim, including quotes

A cell containing a plain (non-formula) value -> #N/A, per docs: 'The cell used as the Reference argument does not contain a formula.' Confirmed via https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/formulatext-function-0a786771-54fd-4ae2-96ee-09cda35439c8
A blank cell has no formula either -> #N/A
